/usr/bin/ar qc ../../archive_output_directory/libbacktrace.a CMakeFiles/backtrace_objlib.dir/sha793921876c981/backtrace.c.o CMakeFiles/backtrace_objlib.dir/sha793921876c981/dwarf.c.o CMakeFiles/backtrace_objlib.dir/sha793921876c981/elf.c.o CMakeFiles/backtrace_objlib.dir/sha793921876c981/fileline.c.o CMakeFiles/backtrace_objlib.dir/sha793921876c981/mmap.c.o CMakeFiles/backtrace_objlib.dir/sha793921876c981/mmapio.c.o CMakeFiles/backtrace_objlib.dir/sha793921876c981/posix.c.o CMakeFiles/backtrace_objlib.dir/sha793921876c981/print.c.o CMakeFiles/backtrace_objlib.dir/sha793921876c981/simple.c.o CMakeFiles/backtrace_objlib.dir/sha793921876c981/sort.c.o CMakeFiles/backtrace_objlib.dir/sha793921876c981/state.c.o CMakeFiles/backtrace_objlib.dir/src/stacktrace.cc.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../../archive_output_directory/libbacktrace.a
